source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, in parallelogram $ABCD$, $E$ is the midpoint of side $AD$. Line segments $AC$ and $BE$ intersect at point $F$. If the area of $\triangle AEF$ is 2, then what is the area of $\triangle ABC$?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution:} Given $\because$ parallelogram ABCD\\
$\therefore$ $AD\parallel BC$ and $AD=BC$\\
$\because$ E is the midpoint of side AD\\
$\therefore$ BC=2AE\\
$\because$ $AE\parallel BC$\\
$\therefore$ $\angle EAC=\angle BCA$\\
Also, $\because$ $\angle EFA=\angle BFC$\\
$\therefore$ $\triangle AEF\sim \triangle CBF$\\
As illustrated, draw $FH\perp AD$ at point H and $FG\perp BC$ at point G,\\
then $\frac{EF}{BF}=\frac{AF}{CF}=\frac{AE}{BC}=\frac{HF}{FG}=\frac{1}{2}$,\\
$\therefore$ $\frac{S_{\triangle AEF}}{S_{\triangle ABC}}=\frac{\frac{1}{2}\cdot AE\cdot FH}{\frac{1}{2}\cdot BC\cdot HG}=\frac{\frac{1}{2}BC\cdot FH}{BC\cdot 3FH}=\frac{1}{6}$,\\
$\because$ the area of $\triangle AEF$ is 2\\
$\therefore$ $S_{\triangle ABC}=6S_{\triangle AEF}=6\times 2=\boxed{12}$

image_dependency: 题干明确写有“As shown in the figure”且 requires_image=true。
这是带有平行四边形、边中点、对角线与连线交点的几何构型，包含明显的空间/位置关系。
text_dominant=false，说明该样本并非纯文本主导。
multi_step: 要求由中点关系、平行四边形性质、线段交点关系推到面积比例，再由已知面积求目标面积，至少包含多步几何推理。
给定答案使用了相似三角形与面积比，说明不是单步代入型问题。
metadata 中 multi_solution_policy.should_push_multi_solution_agent=true，侧面说明该题具备较稳定的多路径推理潜力。
verifiability: 目标答案是明确的数值面积，最终结果可直接核对为 12。
题目条件结构清晰：平行四边形、E 为 AD 中点、AC 与 BE 交于 F、已知三角形面积，便于后续规则化验算。

decision_reasons: 资产完整：题干、答案和主图均存在，且 registry_passed=true、issues 为空。
初步评分较高：image_dependency_score=0.84、multi_step_score=0.82、verifiability_score=0.90，具备较高收录价值。
题目核心语义支撑充分：几何构型依赖图像，且答案为可核验的明确数值结果，适合进入候选池。

\textbf{Solution:} Given $\because$ parallelogram ABCD\\
$\therefore$ $AD\parallel BC$ and $AD=BC$\\
$\because$ E is the midpoint of side AD\\
$\therefore$ BC=2AE\\
$\because$ $AE\parallel BC$\\
$\therefore$ $\angle EAC=\angle BCA$\\
Also, $\because$ $\angle EFA=\angle BFC$\\
$\therefore$ $\triangle AEF\sim \triangle CBF$\\
As illustrated, draw $FH\perp AD$ at point H and $FG\perp BC$ at point G,\\
then $\frac{EF}{BF}=\frac{AF}{CF}=\frac{AE}{BC}=\frac{HF}{FG}=\frac{1}{2}$,\\
$\therefore$ $\frac{S_{\triangle AEF}}{S_{\triangle ABC}}=\frac{\frac{1}{2}\cdot AE\cdot FH}{\frac{1}{2}\cdot BC\cdot HG}=\frac{\frac{1}{2}BC\cdot FH}{BC\cdot 3FH}=\frac{1}{6}$,\\
$\because$ the area of $\triangle AEF$ is 2\\
$\therefore$ $S_{\triangle ABC}=6S_{\triangle AEF}=6\times 2=\boxed{12}$

variants.title: MM-Math 开放题
variants.rewritten_question_text: As shown in the figure, in parallelogram $ABCD$, $E$ is the midpoint of side $AD$. Line segments $AC$ and $BE$ intersect at point $F$. If the area of $\triangle AEF$ is 2, then what is the area of $\triangle ABC$?
variants.expected_answer:
\textbf{Solution:} Given $\because$ parallelogram ABCD\\
$\therefore$ $AD\parallel BC$ and $AD=BC$\\
$\because$ E is the midpoint of side AD\\
$\therefore$ BC=2AE\\
$\because$ $AE\parallel BC$\\
$\therefore$ $\angle EAC=\angle BCA$\\
Also, $\because$ $\angle EFA=\angle BFC$\\
$\therefore$ $\triangle AEF\sim \triangle CBF$\\
As illustrated, draw $FH\perp AD$ at point H and $FG\perp BC$ at point G,\\
then $\frac{EF}{BF}=\frac{AF}{CF}=\frac{AE}{BC}=\frac{HF}{FG}=\frac{1}{2}$,\\
$\therefore$ $\frac{S_{\triangle AEF}}{S_{\triangle ABC}}=\frac{\frac{1}{2}\cdot AE\cdot FH}{\frac{1}{2}\cdot BC\cdot HG}=\frac{\frac{1}{2}BC\cdot FH}{BC\cdot 3FH}=\frac{1}{6}$,\\
$\because$ the area of $\triangle AEF$ is 2\\
$\therefore$ $S_{\triangle ABC}=6S_{\triangle AEF}=6\times 2=\boxed{12}$
